reviews.comment:
Desastre el taller mecanico, ,me entregaron el auto todo engrasado en el volante y en la palanca de cambio y los ruidos continuan, siendo que abone 22000 pesos.

(Translated by Google)
The mechanic's workshop was a disaster; they returned the car to me all greased up on the steering wheel and gear shift lever, and the noises continue, even though I paid 22,000 pesos.
